hero.name: Róbert Gulyás
hero.title: Strategic IT Leader | Digital Transformation | E-Government
hero.description: Strategic IT leader with 30+ years of experience, overseeing multi-billion-forint development programs, complex transformations and EU-funded initiatives in public administration.

about.heading: About Me
about.bio: Built a career from deep technical foundations to national-level IT leadership. I bridge technology, governance and human-centric leadership to create long-term, sustainable value in highly regulated environments. I believe technology is truly valuable when it serves people.

newsletter.heading: Newsletter
newsletter.description: Subscribe to get notified about new content, thoughts on IT leadership and digital transformation.

privacy.heading: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This policy describes how Róbert Gulyás (hereinafter: Data Controller) handles your personal data in connection with the newsletter subscription.
privacy.dataText: Email address, name (optional), subscription date, consent timestamp.
privacy.purposeText: Sending newsletters about IT leadership, digital transformation, and related topics.
privacy.retentionText: Data is retained until consent is withdrawn (unsubscription).
privacy.rightsText: You have the right to withdraw consent, access, rectify, delete, and port your data. Please submit your request to the email below.
privacy.sharingText: We do not share your personal data with third parties.
privacy.contactText: For privacy-related questions, contact me at:
